title: Security gate enforcement
objective: Turn the security policies from documentation into executable gates that fail early when a task or patch violates forbidden scopes, commands, or secrets rules.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Implement forbidden path detection for task packets and generated patch paths.
Implement command allow/deny validation before runner execution.
Add secret pattern checks for task packets, environment exports, run summaries, and artifacts where practical.
When a gate fails, produce a structured run-result with failureCategory and reasonCode.
Add tests for .env*, production infra, deploy-prod workflows, and denied commands.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: 보안 정책 위반을 gate 실패로 막고 명확한 리포트를 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
